name: testWaitScopeGetAnalysedBitSegments
title: testWaitScopeGetAnalysedBitSegments
syntax: long testWaitScopeGetAnalysedBitSegments(long bitNumber, ScopeAnalyseBitSegmentData segmentData, dword noOfSegments);
description: Request the analysis data for a single bit. The analysis data are calculated by calling the function testWaitForScopeAnalyseBitSegments.

parameters.name: bitNumber
parameters.description: The bit number the data are requested.The number must be between 0 and the return value of the function testWaitForScopeAnalyseBitSegments.
